seoTitle: Texas Instruments Solutions | Industrial & Automotive Applications | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Explore Texas Instruments application solutions for motor control, digital power, and industrial automation. Complete reference designs with BOM and technical support from authorized distributor.

faqs.question: What complete solutions does BeiLuo offer for Texas Instruments products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides complete application solutions based on Texas Instruments components including motor control systems, digital power supplies, sensor interfaces, and embedded control platforms. Each solution includes complete BOM, reference schematics, software libraries, and technical documentation. Our FAE team offers design review and optimization services to ensure your implementation meets performance and cost targets.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our solution catalog or contact our applications team for customized solution recommendations.

faqs.question: How can BeiLuo help accelerate my TI-based design?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo accelerates your design cycle through multiple services: reference designs with proven hardware and software, FAE-led design reviews, programming and testing services, and local inventory for rapid prototyping. Our team has deep expertise in C2000 motor control, digital power, and precision analog applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical team early in your design cycle for maximum benefit from our support services.

faqs.question: What support is included with TI reference designs from BeiLuo?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides comprehensive support for TI reference designs including: schematic and layout review, software customization, component sourcing with competitive pricing, production programming and testing, and ongoing technical support. Our FAE team can help adapt reference designs to your specific requirements and optimize for cost and performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss your project requirements and available support services.

faqs.question: How do I select the right TI solution for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right TI solution involves: defining performance requirements and constraints, evaluating available reference designs, considering development time and resources, and assessing total cost of ownership. BeiLuo's FAE team can help analyze your requirements and recommend optimal solutions from TI's extensive portfolio.
faqs.decisionGuide: Schedule a consultation with our applications team for personalized solution recommendations.

faqs.question: Can BeiLuo customize TI reference designs for specific requirements?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo offers customization services for TI reference designs. Our engineering team can modify hardware designs, adapt software algorithms, optimize BOM costs, and integrate additional features to meet your specific application requirements. We maintain close relationships with TI's application teams to ensure customizations follow best practices.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our engineering team to discuss customization requirements and feasibility.

solutions.title: Industrial Motor Control and Drive Solution
solutions.name: Industrial Motor Control and Drive Solution
solutions.description: Comprehensive motor control solution based on TI C2000 real-time controllers for AC induction, PMSM, and BLDC motors up to 100kW.
solutions.longDescription:
The Industrial Motor Control and Drive Solution from ti represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of ti components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.
features: Dual-core C2000 real-time control with 200MHz processing
Integrated current sensing with isolated amplifiers
benefits: Sub-microsecond control loop response with CLA coprocessor
High-precision current measurement with galvanic isolation
Flexible motor type support (ACIM, PMSM, BLDC)
Scalable from low-voltage to high-voltage drives

keyComponents.description: Dual-core Delfino microcontroller for real-time motor control
Precision isolated amplifier for current sensing
High-accuracy temperature sensor for thermal monitoring

customerCases.challenge: Customer needed to upgrade aging CNC servo drives for higher positioning accuracy and faster response times. Existing analog system suffered from drift and lacked diagnostics.
customerCases.solution: Implemented digital servo drive using TMS320F28379D with high-resolution PWM and CLA coprocessor. AMC1300 isolated amplifiers provided safe current feedback.
customerCases.results: Achieved ±1µm positioning accuracy (5x improvement). Machine throughput improved by 35%. Diagnostic capabilities reduced maintenance downtime by 60%.
customerCases.feedback: BeiLuo provided professional technical support throughout the project, from solution selection to mass production, helping us save significant development time and costs.

customerCases.challenge: Needed variable frequency drive for solar-powered water pumps operating from 200-800V DC with outdoor temperature extremes.
customerCases.solution: Designed solar pump inverter using C2000 controller with integrated MPPT algorithm. Three-phase output used intelligent PWM control with automatic optimization.
customerCases.results: Achieved 98.5% peak efficiency with MPPT tracking above 99%. Water pumping capacity increased by 25%. Remote monitoring reduced field service visits by 70%.
customerCases.feedback: BeiLuo provided professional technical support throughout the project, from solution selection to mass production, helping us save significant development time and costs.

faeInsights.title: Senior FAE - Power Management
faeInsights.insight: Based on my extensive experience supporting industrial customers with Industrial Motor Control and Drive Solution, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven TI architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.
faeInsights.logic: This solution leverages TI's technology advantages in integrated device design. The highly integrated architecture minimizes external components, reducing system complexity and total cost while ensuring stability across operating conditions.

bestPractices: Use adequate heat sinking for power components
Verify all protection features during testing

faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo FAE for project timeline estimation.

solutions.title: Digital Power Supply and PFC Solution
solutions.name: Digital Power Supply and PFC Solution
solutions.description: Advanced digital power solution using TI C2000 controllers for AC/DC and DC/DC power conversion with power factor correction.
solutions.longDescription:
The Digital Power Supply and PFC Solution from ti represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of ti components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.
benefits: Adaptive control algorithms optimize efficiency across load range
Digital compensation eliminates analog component drift
Fast transient response with adaptive voltage positioning

keyComponents.description: Dual-core controller for PFC and DC/DC control
Low-side gate driver for power switches

customerCases.challenge: Needed high-efficiency server power supply meeting 80 Plus Titanium standards with fast transient response for dynamic server loads.
customerCases.solution: Implemented digital power solution using F28379D with interleaved CCM PFC and LLC resonant DC/DC. Adaptive burst mode improved light-load efficiency.
customerCases.results: Achieved 96.5% peak efficiency, exceeding 80 Plus Titanium requirements. Light-load efficiency at 10% improved by 8%. PMBus telemetry enabled datacenter-wide optimization.
customerCases.feedback: BeiLuo provided professional technical support throughout the project, from solution selection to mass production, helping us save significant development time and costs.

customerCases.challenge: Required 2kW rectifier for telecom base stations operating from -40C to +75C with strict EMI requirements and hot-swap capability.
customerCases.solution: Designed digital rectifier using C2000 controller with Vienna rectifier PFC. Multiple units communicated via CAN bus for load sharing.
customerCases.results: Achieved >0.995 power factor and <3% THD. Efficiency remained >95% across full temperature range. Field reliability exceeded 500,000 hours MTBF.
customerCases.feedback: BeiLuo provided professional technical support throughout the project, from solution selection to mass production, helping us save significant development time and costs.
